computed.todayAttendance: {{(() => { const list = today?.data?.data ?? []; const user = _global.currentUser; if (!user || !list.length) return null; return list.find(a => a.user?.id === user.id) ?? null; })()}}
computed.rankingPoint: {{(() => { const a = _computed.todayAttendance; if (!a) return 0; const rank = a.daily_rank; if (rank === 1) return settings?.data?.rank_1_bonus ?? 0; if (rank === 2) return settings?.data?.rank_2_bonus ?? 0; if (rank === 3) return settings?.data?.rank_3_bonus ?? 0; return 0; })()}}

iteration.source: {{(() => { const total = _computed.daysInMonth; const days = _computed.calendarDays; const result = []; for (let d = 1; d <= total; d++) { const dayData = days.find(function(dd) { const date = dd.date; const dayNum = parseInt(date.split('-').pop(), 10); return dayNum === d; }); result.push({ day: d, status: dayData?.status ?? 'future' }); } return result; })()}}
